hero.description: One-click liquidity for the Arc Network. Arcade handles the complex FX logic under the hood so you can swap USDC to EURC at lightning speed with zero slippage.

pool.title: Pool Depth
pool.pool_description: Total liquidity currently available in the Arcade Escrow for swapping.
pool.insufficient_warning: Low pool depth causes trades to fail. Adding liquidity ensures a smooth experience for all FX traders.
pool.appeal_text: Arcade is a new protocol and we are still building our core reserves. To help stabilize FX trading for everyone, please consider adding small amounts of USDC or EURC to the pool.

swap.allowance_message: Your token allowance is less than the swap amount. Would you like to increase your allowance?

faucet.title: FUEL YOUR WALLET
faucet.description: Arcade runs on the Arc Testnet. You need Testnet USDC to pay for gas and trade. Use the official Circle Faucet below to get topped up.
